title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information about a cooking competition.
audio_script: Man: Hello, cooks, and welcome to this short recording about the town cooking competition. The competition is open to anyone over sixteen, and it will be held next month at North Hall. This year, the main dish must include [14]rice[/14]. You can cook it in any style you like, but it has to be part of the dish, not just something on the side. Competitors should arrive at the hall by ten o’clock. Cooking begins at ten thirty, and you will have [15]90[/15] minutes to finish your dish. Please bring your own knives and pans, but we will provide ovens, tables and washing-up areas. You do not need to bring plates, because each person will receive a white [16]bowl[/16] for presenting the food. The judges are looking for good taste, of course, but they will also give marks for colour and careful preparation. The head judge this year is Maria [17]Stone[/17], who owns the restaurant by the river. She will speak to competitors after the prizes are given. Friends and family can watch from the seats at the back of the hall, but they must not help during the competition. The first prize is a cooking lesson for two people. The second prize is a set of [18]spoons[/18], made by a local company. Everyone who enters will also get a certificate. To take part, you need to complete the form on our website before [19]June 12th[/19]. Late forms cannot be accepted because we need to plan the tables. Competitors should also bring a clean apron, and long hair must be tied back while food is being prepared.

questions.explanation: The main dish must include rice.
Competitors will have ninety minutes to finish.
Each competitor will receive a white bowl for presenting the food.
The head judge is Maria Stone.
The second prize is a set of spoons.
The form must be completed before June 12th.
